other_observers: Larry Modesitt; Bill Schmoker first found the birds late in the morning of 8/8 on the SW side of the reservoir in Logan County.
specific_location: On the SE side of Jumbo Reservoir right by the campground.
description: blue cap on top of head, red check and back of neck, also red stripe down the front of the neck. Blue and red wings and back. White belly and sides of neck. Yellow legs, eyes, and lores. Pink upper mandible and dark upper mandible, with the tip darker than the rest.Behaviors: It was acting like an Egretta heron, dancing around while feeding with wings open, but not as long as Reddish Egret. Other wise it they would just either stand or walk through the water.Call: didn't hear themPlumage: juvenile
photographer: Photographer: Cole Wild, Cole Wild, Cole Wild
